name: The Citizens National Bank Of Hammond
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank in Hammond, NY, established in 1913, offering savings accounts, CDs, mortgages, and HELOC products across 2 branches.
description_long:
The Citizens National Bank of Hammond is a community-based FDIC-insured institution founded in 1913 and headquartered at 19 Main Street in Hammond, NY 13646. With approximately $28 million in assets and $25.54 million in deposits, it operates as a small regional bank serving its local market. The bank holds FDIC Certificate #14820, providing deposit protection up to $250,000 per account category.

The bank offers a range of traditional banking products including savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs) with terms from 1 to 5 years, fixed-rate mortgages (both 30-year and 15-year options), and home equity lines of credit (HELOC). As of April 2026, their notable rates include 4.20% APY on savings, 4.59% on 1-year CDs, and a 4.91% APR on 30-year mortgages. Customers can access these products through one of two physical branch locations.

As a small community bank, Citizens National Bank of Hammond distinguishes itself through local relationship banking and established institutional history spanning over a century. The bank maintains a modest but stable capital base of $2.37 million against $19.91 million in outstanding loans, indicating conservative lending practices. Their long operational tenure since 1913 suggests stability and deep community roots in the Hammond area.

However, prospective customers should note significant limitations: the bank's small asset base ($28 million) means limited product variety compared to regional or national banks, loan rates are not currently publicly available on their profile, and comprehensive deposit rate information for checking and savings accounts is not fully displayed. As a very small institution, they may offer fewer digital banking conveniences than larger competitors and limited branching options.
services: Safe deposit boxes or vault services
pros: FDIC insured with Certificate #14820 providing deposit protection
Established in 1913 with over 110 years of operating history and community presence
Competitive CD rates up to 4.59% APY on 1-year CDs as of April 2026
Offers both 30-year and 15-year fixed mortgage options
Provides HELOC products for home equity borrowing
Local community bank with direct relationships and two accessible branches
cons: Very small asset base ($27.99 million) limits product diversity and may indicate limited resources
Loan rates not publicly available online; customers must contact bank directly for current pricing
Only 2 branch locations restrict customer access and convenience
Limited digital presence and online banking capabilities compared to larger institutions
Deposit rates and checking account details not fully disclosed on current profile
best_for: Local Hammond, NY residents seeking relationship banking with a community institution
Customers prioritizing FDIC insurance and stability over product breadth
Homeowners in the Hammond area looking for local mortgage and HELOC options
diagnosis: The Citizens National Bank of Hammond is best suited for residents of Hammond, NY and surrounding areas seeking traditional banking services with FDIC protection and local relationship banking. The primary caveat is its very small size ($28M in assets) and limited product offerings; customers needing diverse loan products, comprehensive digital banking, or multiple branch locations should consider larger regional alternatives.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
